pages.text: $(bold)Where rotation comes from$(), roughly in order of game progress:$(br)$(li)$(bold)Hand Crank$() — a few seconds of power on demand; fine for a Millstone.$(li)$(bold)Water Wheel$() / $(bold)Large Water Wheel$() — steady, free, early-game power from flowing water.$(li)$(bold)Windmill$() — sails on a $(l:4_contraptions/bearings)Mechanical Bearing$(); more sails, more force.
pages.title: Early Sources

pages.text: $(bold)Steam$() is the heavy hitter. Build a multi-block $(bold)Boiler$(): tanks of water heated by $(create)Blaze Burners$(), feeding $(bold)Steam Engines$() on Fluid Tanks. A maxed boiler dwarfs every earlier source.$(br2)Burner fuel and boiler tuning is its own craft — see $(l:7_shelf/blaze_fuels)Fuels & Burners$(). Later still, electricity can spin a motor: $(l:6_energy/crafts_additions)Crafts & Additions$().
pages.title: Steam & Beyond
